subcommands.name: --get
subcommands.description: Get a value from an INI file

subcommands.name: --set
subcommands.description: Set a value in an INI file

subcommands.name: --del
subcommands.description: Delete a key or section from an INI file

subcommands.name: --merge
subcommands.description: Merge INI data from stdin into file

subcommands.name: --get --format=lines
subcommands.description: Get all keys in a section as lines

subcommands.name: --existing
subcommands.description: Only update existing keys (fail if missing)

globalOptions.name: --existing
globalOptions.description: Fail if the section or key does not exist

globalOptions.name: --format
globalOptions.description: Output format: sh, lines, or ini

globalOptions.name: --output
globalOptions.description: Write output to file instead of modifying in-place
